hero.headline: Search any area. Get every business.
hero.subheadline: Find, filter, and export business data from Google Maps. Instantly.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. That's it.
howItWorks.desc: No API keys. No task queues. No waiting. Just search, filter, export.

step1.title: Search any area
step1.desc: Type a keyword and pick a location on the map. Add filters for websites, emails, ratings, and more.

step2.title: Get instant results
step2.desc: Results appear in seconds in a clean, sortable table. Every business pinned on the map for geographic context.

step3.title: Export and use
step3.desc: Download your data as a clean CSV. Free export, no extra charge. Your data, your way.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Pay as you go. No subscriptions.
pricing.subtitle: 1 credit = 1 business result. Buy what you need, use it whenever.
pricing.agency: Need more? Agency pack: 100,000 credits for $120 ($1.20 per 1,000 results)

compare.label: Why MapSearch
compare.title: Same data. Half the price. Better experience.

cta.title: Ready to find every business in your area?
cta.desc: Create your free account and get 99 credits. No credit card required.

signup.title: Create your free account
signup.desc: Get 99 free credits — enough for your first search. No credit card needed.
signup.terms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
signup.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign in
signup.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome back
login.desc: Sign in to your MapSearch account.
login.signupLink: Don't have an account? Sign up free
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

results.noResultsDesc: Try a different keyword or location.
results.noFilterMatchDesc: Try adjusting your filters to see more results.
results.loadingDesc: This usually takes a few seconds.

credits.lowBalanceDesc: You have {count} credits left. Buy more to keep searching.

errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this search. You need {required} credits but have {available}.
errors.tooManyResults: This search would return too many results. Try narrowing your area or adding filters.

tooltips.creditBalance: Your available search credits. 1 credit = 1 business result.
tooltips.hasWebsite: Filter businesses that have (or don't have) a website.
tooltips.hasEmail: Filter businesses that have (or don't have) a listed email address.
tooltips.rating: Filter by Google Maps star rating (1.0 to 5.0).
tooltips.reviews: Filter by number of Google reviews.
tooltips.claimed: Claimed listings are managed by the business owner on Google.
tooltips.priceLevel: Price level as shown on Google Maps.
tooltips.radius: Adjust the search area around your selected location.
tooltips.csvExport: Download all visible results as a CSV file. No extra charge.

empty.noSearchesDesc: Start by searching for businesses in any area.
empty.noHistoryDesc: Your credit transactions will appear here.
